retry_reason: If ret is NULL, target has no pcie_device attached; under the held lock the pointer cannot change, so retrying is pointless.
contract_summary: Get-wrapper that acquires a reference on the pcie_device associated with a target. The caller must hold ioc->pcie_device_lock when calling this function. Returns a pointer to the pcie_device with an incremented refcount if one exists, or NULL if no pcie_device is attached. The caller must later release the reference with pcie_device_put().
